benefits.description: Currently losing weight on tirzepatide and wants to protect progress
Hoping BPC-157 will help with general pain and recovery
Seeking general recovery support from BPC-157

side_effects.description: Very sensitive to medications that increase appetite; concerned ipamorelin may increase appetite and undermine weight loss

protocol_notes: OP is planning to start BPC-157 and was considering ipamorelin for muscle tone but is hesitant due to potential appetite increase. Asking for low side effect profile alternatives that won't increase appetite.
